channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Saturday, June 20
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 09:31 AM (1.307 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 02:48 AM (0.047 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 14 G 20 mph
